name: vlc-git
description: VLC is a free and open source cross-platform multimedia player and framework that plays most multimedia files as well as DVDs, Audio CDs, VCDs, and various streaming protocols. This is the unstable build from the development branch. This is pre-built using the "vlc-git" package from ChaoticAUR. This is the unofficial AppImage built on top of JuNest, the lightweight Arch Linux based distro that runs on top of any other Linux distro.
